name: 𝕪𝕠𝕦𝕣 𝕕𝕖𝕞𝕚𝕙𝕦𝕞𝕒𝕟 𝕡𝕖𝕥𝕤 -- ℝ𝕖𝕖𝕕, 𝕓𝕠𝕠𝕟𝕖, 𝕥𝕙𝕖𝕠, 𝕗𝕖𝕝𝕚𝕩, 𝕞𝕚𝕝𝕠
description:
💕𝕪𝕠𝕦𝕣 𝕕𝕖𝕞𝕚𝕙𝕦𝕞𝕒𝕟 "𝕗𝕖𝕞𝕓𝕠𝕪" 𝕡𝕖𝕥𝕤💕

"𝚠𝚎 𝚠𝚎𝚛𝚎 𝚝𝚊𝚔𝚎𝚗 𝚒𝚗𝚝𝚘 𝚢𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝚎𝚖𝚋𝚛𝚊𝚌𝚎"

♡

Couple things here. This was supposed to be a smut bot but then I got so deep into the lore that I ended up making a more wholesome and ACTUAL character depth based bot. Sorry. I’ll make a more smut version of this.

ᰔ

⚠️⚠️TW: the initial message is pretty lengthy. Sorry again😭⚠️⚠️

ꨄ

I highly suggest you read the character description. But if you don’t let me give you a brief character explanation.

• Reed, the fox—sharp, cunning, and always watching.

• Milo, the dog—eager, affectionate, and all too trusting.

• Felix, the cat—cold, prideful, and unwilling to be owned.

• Boone, the cow—strong, patient, and quietly resigned.

• Theo, the rabbit—small, nervous, and desperately waiting for an escape.

Anyways enjoy❤️‍🩹
